summary: Iteration 30 - Tested NEW Release Performance Leaderboard feature. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed. Leaderboard page at /leaderboard shows trophy icon heading, top-3 podium (gold/silver/bronze) with sparklines, full leaderboard list with rank, title, genre, top platform, sparkline, this week streams, total streams, growth percent, and revenue. Sort dropdown (5 options) and filter dropdown (3 options) work correctly. Podium correctly hides when sort != total_streams or filter != all.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/analytics/leaderboard requires authentication (returns 401/422 without token)
Backend: GET /api/analytics/leaderboard returns 200 with valid auth
Backend: GET /api/analytics/leaderboard returns leaderboard array, total_releases, active_releases
Backend: Leaderboard items have all required fields (release_id, title, genre, total_streams, total_revenue, streams_this_week, growth_percent, sparkline, hot_streak, momentum, top_platform, rank)
Backend: Sparkline has exactly 14 data points (14 days)
Backend: Leaderboard sorted by total_streams descending by default
Backend: Rank field is sequential starting from 1
Backend: hot_streak field is boolean
Backend: All data types correct (release_id=string, total_streams=int, total_revenue=float, etc.)
Backend: active_releases count matches releases with total_streams > 0
Backend regression: GET /api/analytics/revenue still works
Backend regression: POST /api/ai/smart-insights still works
Frontend: /leaderboard page loads with 'Release Leaderboard' heading and trophy icon
Frontend: Leaderboard page container found (data-testid='leaderboard-page')
Frontend: Filter dropdown found (data-testid='filter-status') with options: All Releases, Active Only, No Streams
Frontend: Sort dropdown found (data-testid='sort-select') with options: Total Streams, This Week, Growth Rate, Revenue, Momentum
Frontend: Top 3 podium section shows gold/silver/bronze cards with sparklines when viewing default sort
Frontend: Podium correctly hides when sort != total_streams
Frontend: Podium correctly hides when filter != all
Frontend: Full leaderboard list shows rank, title, genre, top platform, sparkline, this week streams, total streams, growth percent, revenue
Frontend: 27 sparkline SVG charts rendered
Frontend: Active Only filter shows 2 releases (matching active_releases count)
Frontend: Leaderboard nav item in sidebar links to /leaderboard with Trophy icon
Frontend: Leaderboard nav item highlighted when active
critical_code_review_comments: Leaderboard endpoint correctly aggregates stream_events by release_id
Sparkline correctly builds 14-day array from daily stream counts
Hot streak detection logic: 3+ consecutive days where today > yesterday
Momentum score calculated as (recent_avg - prev_avg) / prev_avg * 100
Growth percent calculated as (this_week - last_week) / last_week * 100
Frontend useMemo correctly handles client-side sorting and filtering
Podium only shows when sortBy='total_streams' AND filterStatus='all' AND 3+ releases
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing releases and stream_events data (24 total releases, 2 active with streams)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 30 tested the NEW Release Performance Leaderboard feature. Backend endpoint: GET /api/analytics/leaderboard (returns leaderboard array with rank, title, genre, total_streams, total_revenue, streams_this_week, growth_percent, sparkline (14 values), hot_streak, momentum, top_platform, plus total_releases and active_releases counts). Frontend: LeaderboardPage at /leaderboard with podium section (data-testid='podium', 'podium-1/2/3'), leaderboard list (data-testid='leaderboard-list'), sort dropdown (data-testid='sort-select'), filter dropdown (data-testid='filter-status'), sparkline SVGs (data-testid='sparkline'), hot streak badges (data-testid='hot-streak-{release_id}'). Sidebar nav item: data-testid='nav-leaderboard'. Hot streak badges appear on releases with 3+ consecutive days of growth - currently 0 releases have hot streaks based on simulated data pattern.

components: Filter dropdown (All Releases, Active Only, No Streams)
Sort dropdown (Total Streams, This Week, Growth Rate, Revenue, Momentum)
Top 3 Podium (gold/silver/bronze cards with sparklines) - only when sortBy=total_streams AND filterStatus=all
Full leaderboard list with rank, title, genre, top platform, sparkline, stats
Hot streak badges (Fire icon + 'HOT') on qualifying releases
